name: OCHI Dashboard
description: Oregon Coastal Hospitality Intelligence — a predictive dashboard for Pacific City coastal tourism.
purpose: Monitor five Gatekeeper signals and a Master Multiplier score to forecast daily tourism volume and make smart operational decisions.
welcomeScript: Welcome to OCHI — Oregon Coastal Hospitality Intelligence. This is a raw, utilitarian instrument of prediction. Five Gatekeeper signals feed a single Master Multiplier score between 0.00 and 1.00. Above 0.70 is high volume. Below 0.40 means stay lean. The Forecast Annotation explains why.
suggestedPrompts: What does a High Volume reading mean?
